scope: Project-level reusable multi-state character reference board for Qingling Yajian, an individual Snowfeather crow scout.

locked_references.role: global low-magic eastern epic mood lock
project material and tactile surface lock
border-to-north regional color reference for blackstone snowline, frozen earth, ochre grass, and restrained blue survival fire
Northern bone, wood, fur, hide rope, oath cord, and frost material reference
locked Northern Beastfolk Alliance emblem reference; do not redesign
locked Northern symbol extension board for bonewood oath knots, horn-branch marks, claw-tooth cuts, feather wood pieces, and blue fire points
generic Snowfeather wall-climber and Northern siege troop contrast; Qingling Yajian must be more individualized
Northern noble shaman contrast; Qingling Yajian must not inherit Luming's aristocratic or shamanic silhouette

assets.name_cn: 青翎鸦见多状态角色板
downstream_usage: Prompt Room personal identity lock for Qingling Yajian
ComfyUI reference input for wall-climb, rope-throwing, gate-flag cutting, cold scout, messenger, and Hanwubao snowline shots
Costume continuity reference for Snowfeather crow scout tools, feather arm cape, bone hook, rope spool, message tube, oath cord, and personal teal feather anchor
Contrast reference separating named Snowfeather scouts from generic Northern siege troop archetypes and Luming's noble shaman design

batch_rules: Do not redesign existing faction emblems.
Treat the teal feather as a personal plumage anchor, not a new badge or crest.
Use the locked Northern Beastfolk Alliance bonewood emblem language only as tiny physical oath knot, rope charm, tool tag, or feather wood sliver.

Preserve Qingling Yajian's personal identifiers across all states: left-side teal feather cluster, right-eye pale scar, corvid face, feather arm cape, bone grappling hook, rope spool, message tube, three right-forearm bone rings, and dark blood oath cord.
Keep the character as a practical Snowfeather crow scout: light, long-limbed, wall-oriented, tool-based, and low-magic.

Do not make the character look like Luming's noble shaman costume, a generic Snowfeather troop model, Grey Wall human soldier, Suming insect infantry, Eastern Yingzhou crane clan, or modern ninja/assassin.
No visible text, labels, captions, Chinese characters, Latin letters, UI, or watermark inside generated images.
